mapper.select:
SELECT T.SELL_USIM_KEY, T.USIM_NO, T.FRGNR_NAME, T.FRGNR_NAME AS FRGNR_NAME_MSK, trim(T.MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_RN) as MOBILE_NO , trim(T.MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_RN) as MOBILE_NO_MSK , T.MAIL, T.MAIL AS MAIL_MSK, T.FRGNR_RN, T.FRGNR_PN, T.VDATE_START, T.VDATE_END, T.FILE_NAME, T.FILE_MASK, T.ETC_FILE_NAME, T.ETC_FILE_MASK, T.LANG_TYPE, T.PSTATE, T.SSTATE, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MCP_SELL_USIM', 'SSTATE', SSTATE) AS SSTATE_NAME, T.RIP, TO_CHAR(T.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') RDATE, T.UIP MIP , TO_CHAR(T.SYS_UDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') MDATE,
CASE WHEN (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID=T.AGENT_ID) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID=T.AGENT_ID) ||'('|| T.AGENT_ID ||')' ELSE T.AGENT_ID END AS AGENT_ID,
T.AGENT_ID AS USR_ID ,
CASE WHEN T.FILE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS FILE_OX,
CASE WHEN T.ETC_FILE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS ETC_FILE_OX, T.FILE_ENC_FLAG AS FILE_ENC_FLAG, T.RCG_AUTO_AMT AS RCG_AUTO_AMT, T.END_USR_ID AS END_USR_ID, FN_GET_USRNM(T.END_USR_ID) END_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(T.END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DT, T.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM, T.RCG_SEQ AS RCG_SEQ, T.REMARK AS REMARK FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP T WHERE 1=1
AND T.USIM_NO LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND T.FRGNR_NAME LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND RTRIM(LTRIM(MOBILE_FN || MOBILE_MN || MOBILE_RN)) LIKE '%'|| #{searchName}||'%'
AND T.AGENT_ID LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND T.SSTATE = #{sstate}
AND T.AGENT_ID = #{cntpntShopId}
AND TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE , 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN #{sysRdateS} AND #{sysRdateE}
ORDER BY T.SELL_USIM_KEY DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP SET SSTATE = #{sstate}, AGENT_ID = #{usrId}, END_USR_ID = DECODE(SSTATE, '20', #{adminId}, END_USR_ID ), END_DT = DECODE(SSTATE, '20', TRUNC(SYSDATE), END_DT), REMARK = DECODE(TRIM(#{inputRemark}), '', REMARK, '['||TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YY/MM/DD')||' '||#{adminNm}||'] '||TRIM(#{inputRemark})||CHR(13)||REMARK) WHERE SELL_USIM_KEY = #{sellUsimKey}
mapper.select:
SELECT T.SELL_USIM_KEY, T.USIM_NO, T.FRGNR_NAME, trim(T.MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(T.MOBILE_RN) as MOBILE_NO , T.MAIL, T.FRGNR_RN, T.FRGNR_PN, T.VDATE_START, T.VDATE_END, T.FILE_NAME, T.FILE_MASK, T.ETC_FILE_NAME, T.ETC_FILE_MASK, T.LANG_TYPE, T.PSTATE, T.SSTATE, CASE WHEN (T.SSTATE) = '00' THEN '대기중(Waiting)' WHEN (T.SSTATE) = '10' THEN '등록요청(Request)' WHEN (T.SSTATE) = '20' THEN '처리완료(Finished)' END AS SSTATE_NAME, T.RIP, TO_CHAR(T.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') RDATE, T.UIP MIP , TO_CHAR(T.SYS_UDATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD : HH24:MI:SS') MDATE,
CASE WHEN (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID=T.AGENT_ID) IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID=T.AGENT_ID) ||'('|| T.AGENT_ID ||')' ELSE T.AGENT_ID END AS AGENT_ID,
T.AGENT_ID AS USR_ID ,
CASE WHEN T.FILE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS FILE_OX,
CASE WHEN T.ETC_FILE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END AS ETC_FILE_OX
FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP T WHERE 1=1
AND T.USIM_NO LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND T.FRGNR_NAME LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND RTRIM(LTRIM(MOBILE_FN || MOBILE_MN || MOBILE_RN)) LIKE '%'|| #{searchName}||'%'
AND T.AGENT_ID LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND T.SSTATE = #{sstate}
AND T.AGENT_ID = #{cntpntShopId}
ORDER BY T.SELL_USIM_KEY DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS ROW_CNT, SUM(DECODE(T.RES_CD,'0000',1,0)) AS SUCC_CNT, SUM(DECODE(T.RES_CD,'0000',0,'',0,1)) AS FAIL_CNT, SUM(DECODE(T.RES_CD,'',1,0)) AS ING_CNT, TO_CHAR(T.BATCH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BATCH_DT, --T.SUBSCRIBER_NO, --T.USIM_NO, --T.CONTRACT_NUM, T.SETUP_ID, T.SETUP_NM, T.SOC, (SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = T.SOC and rownum = 1) AS SERVICE_NM, T.EXPIRE_CNT --T.RCG_SEQ, --T.RES_CD FROM PPS_SELL_USIM_BATCH T WHERE 1=1
AND T.SETUP_ID LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND T.SETUP_NM LIKE '%'||#{searchName}||'%'
AND TO_CHAR(T.BATCH_DT , 'yyyymmdd') BETWEEN #{sysRdateS} AND #{sysRdateE}
GROUP BY T.BATCH_DT, T.SOC, T.SETUP_ID, T.SETUP_NM, T.EXPIRE_CNT ORDER BY T.BATCH_DT DESC

SELECT T.SELL_USIM_KEY AS sellUsimKey , T.FILE_NAME AS fileName , T.FILE_MASK AS fileMask , T.ETC_FILE_NAME AS etcFileName , T.ETC_FILE_MASK AS etcFileMask FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP T WHERE 1=1 AND T.SELL_USIM_KEY = #{sellUsimKey}
AND T.AGENT_ID = #{cntpntShopId}
